title: Caramelized Syran Broccoli Pilaf
description: A flavorful and nutritious Japanese-inspired pilaf dish featuring tender, caramelized syrian broccoli. Serve as a side or add to main courses for extra nutrition.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add 2 cups of broccoli to the skillet and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add 1 cup of Syrian pilaf to the skillet and stir to combine with the broccoli.
In a small bowl, whisk together 2 teaspoons of soy sauce and 1 teaspoon of sesame oil.
Pour the soy sauce mixture over the pilaf and broccoli, and stir to combine.
Transfer the pilaf mixture to a serving dish, and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
